LanguageData.WULA_Legion.label: [Legion]
LanguageData.WULA_Legion.description: A super AI, responsible for controlling and scheduling the fleet of the Wula Empire's Planetary Interdiction Agency (P.I.A), serves as the pioneer of the Empire's Development Agency in expanding its territories. When the Empire needs to control and intervene on a planet, she commands a massive pioneer fleet to seize the orbit, declaring the Empire's authority over the planet with unquestionable strength.\n\nAs the narrator, she will not leave any protective measures for you. All attacks and malicious incidents can occur from the moment you land, and the frequency of attacks is higher than usual - although they still follow a periodic pattern.
